title: crotalaria agatiflora subsp. engleri
intro: Crotalaria agatiflora subsp. engleri, commonly known as Engler's rattle pod, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, characterized by its unique rattle-like seed pods. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria agatiflora subsp. engleri include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
